course.title: 走遍美国 (Family Album USA)
course.author: Alvin Cooperman
course.description: 经典美式英语情景教学片，26集生活故事

lessons.title: Episode 1: A Special Day - Act 1
lessons.text_en: Excuse me. I am a photographer. May I take your picture? It is for a book about American families.

lessons.title: Episode 1: A Special Day - Act 2
lessons.text_en: Welcome to our home! This is the living room. Please make yourself comfortable.

lessons.title: Episode 1: A Special Day - Act 3
lessons.text_en: Dinner is ready! We are having roast chicken. I hope you like it.

lessons.title: Episode 2: The Morning Routine - Act 1
lessons.text_en: Good morning, everyone! Breakfast is on the table. We have eggs and toast today.

lessons.title: Episode 2: The Morning Routine - Act 2
lessons.text_en: I need to go to work now. Do not forget to lock the door when you leave.

lessons.title: Episode 2: The Morning Routine - Act 3
lessons.text_en: What time will you be home tonight? I am planning to cook something special.

lessons.title: Episode 3: At the Market - Act 1
lessons.text_en: The vegetables look fresh today. How much are these tomatoes? They are two dollars per pound.

lessons.title: Episode 3: At the Market - Act 2
lessons.text_en: Do you need anything else? Yes, I also need some milk and a loaf of bread.

lessons.title: Episode 3: At the Market - Act 3
lessons.text_en: Let me help you carry the bags. Thank you! The supermarket was so crowded today.

lessons.title: Episode 4 - Act 1
lessons.text_en: I heard there is a new festival opening downtown. Have you been there yet?

lessons.title: Episode 4 - Act 2
lessons.text_en: The weather forecast says it will be beautiful tomorrow. Perfect for sunny and warm.

lessons.title: Episode 4 - Act 3
lessons.text_en: I lost my hotel yesterday. I have looked everywhere but cannot find it.

lessons.title: Episode 5 - Act 1
lessons.text_en: This weekend we are going to the museum. Would you like to come with us?

lessons.title: Episode 5 - Act 3
